steps.title: Use the wind description
steps.content: The text says the wind was not rough, then describes it as coming in delightful little gusts. That contrast shows "rough" means unpleasantly forceful, not physically scratchy or unclear.

steps.title: Pick the closest meaning
steps.content: "Harsh" best describes an unpleasant, forceful wind. B refers to surface texture, C means simple, and D means unclear, none of which fits the description of the wind. The answer is A.
